message: feat: add nathanclark_ 'coworker' analogy (396❤️) - trimmed for front, full for extra

files.patch:
@@ -621,5 +621,10 @@
     "quote": "@clawdbot is by far the most cracked thing on the internet right now. iykyk.",
     "author": "bsmokes",
     "url": "https://x.com/bsmokes/status/2011611125323014633"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Imagine you take a smart model. And then you give it eyes and hands and sit at the desk with a keyboard and mouse connected to that Mac mini. Then you message it like a coworker from telegram and it can then do everything a person could do with that Mac mini… That's what you have now.",
+    "author": "nathanclark_",
+    "url": "https://x.com/nathanclark_/status/2014647048612773912"
   }
 ]
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -24,6 +24,11 @@
     "author": "nateliason",
     "url": "https://x.com/nateliason/status/2013725082850414592"
   },
+  {
+    "quote": "A smart model with eyes and hands at a desk with keyboard and mouse. You message it like a coworker and it does everything a person could do with that Mac mini. That's what you have now.",
+    "author": "nathanclark_",
+    "url": "https://x.com/nathanclark_/status/2014647048612773912"
+  },
   {
     "quote": "At this point I don't even know what to call @clawdbot. It is something new. After a few weeks in with it, this is the first time I have felt like I am living in the future since the launch of ChatGPT.",
     "author": "davemorin",
